calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ji Unn Lee & Tsaihsin Jason Lin (petitioners) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it is trying to figure out why this petition is necessary as there is already an official certificate. Ms. Lee stated that she has done research and thought that if they were married abroad this step was necessary. The Court stated that it is not aware of a requirement, that this statute is for those that have no record of their marriage, that California recognizes out of state marriages, asked if there was someone refusing to recognize this marriage, cited Health & Safety code 103450 and explained that this is for someone who does not have or cannot get a record of their marriage. Ms. Lee asked about changing her last name. The Court stated that it is not done in this Court under this statute, that her request does not fit what we do here and took the Petition to Establish fact of Marriage off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
